name: tiny-gemini-upkeep
description: Audits tiny-gemini against the live Gemini API — verifies usage works, migrates deprecated or broken APIs, and surfaces new or removed capabilities to decide. Suite member of nicolasdao/tiny-gemini.

install.linux: curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_lts.x | sudo -E bash - && sudo apt-get install -y nodejs
